title: SlashFly
description: Simple mod that adds a /fly command to allow you to fly no matter the gamemode (or not)
body:
A simple mod that adds a /fly command to allow you to fly no matter the gamemode (or not)

# Usage
`/fly [<players>] [<state>]`\
If no `players` are specified the command will target the user.\
If no `state` is specified the command will toggle the flight state of the target.
This will fail if there are multiple targets.

# Languages
Currently English and Dutch are supported.\
If the client does not have the mod installed the language of the server will be used.\
(On a dedicated server this is likely English, in a LAN world it is the current language of the host.)
